旦那様？ この大砲を運びたいのですか？: Darling? You want to move this cannon?
では、クレハにお任せください――えいっ！: Then, please, leave it to Kureha — hyah!
ふふふ、このくらいはたやすいことですよ。<br>私たち鬼族は人よりも遥かに力が強:
Fufufu, something this small is nothing at all.
We oni are far stronger than humans, you see...
（ん？ 本当にこれでいいのでしょうか？ 殿方はか弱い女性を好むと<br>聞いたこ:
(Hm? Is this really alright? I've heard that men prefer
frail, delicate women... if darling is one of them...)
はううぅぅ……旦那様ぁぁ……やっぱり重いですぅ～～。<br>私ったらなんてか弱い:
Haaah... darling... it really is heavy after all~~~.
Oh, what a frail, delicate maiden I am... p-please help meee~~~...
